text:
King Reiss is a title that can be used to refer to several Kings of the Walls that hail from the Reiss family:

Karl Fritz - Called "King Reiss" by Zeke in Chapter 81.
Rod and Uri's father - Father of Rod and Uri Reiss.
Uri Reiss - King after his father until 842.
Rod Reiss - King from years 845 to 850.

See also:

King Fritz - A false King not from the Reiss family that was used by Rod to hide his true identity.
Frieda Reiss - Queen from years 842 to 845.
Historia Reiss - The current Queen of the Walls.
